response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills, open-source contributions, and experience with event-driven systems, which align partially with the CTO role's technical requirements. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of executive-level leadership, multi-agent AI production experience in fintech, or scaling engineering teams to the required size (10+ to 30+). His background is more hands-on and entrepreneurial, with limited exposure to regulated environments or AI-native fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., MCP code generators, Fluent-Asserts) show technical depth and initiative.
Diverse technical background spanning full-stack, embedded, and real-time systems, with adaptability to new languages/tools.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments (e.g., fintech).
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, compliance infrastructure).
